title: Benross 40239 Water Mist Spray Fan/Handheld Cooling Device/Portable For Holidays, Beach Trips, Sports Events, Office Use & Travel Use/Blue Colour
features: WATER MIST SPRAY FAN – This compact and handheld water mist spray bottle with additional fan is the perfect accessory to keep you cool and fresh on hot summer days!
EASY TO USE – The spray fan is super simple to use. Simply fill the bottle with ice or cold water, then turn on the fan and pull the water trigger whenever you require a light covering of cool mist.

LIGHTWEIGHT & PORTABLE – This water mist cooler is compact and light enough to be easily taken away on holidays, on trips to the beach or the park, to kids sporting events, or just general use in the back garden when sunbathing.
BATTERY OPERATED – The water fan is battery operated, and requires 2 x AA batteries to work (not included). The unit is blue in colour, measures 22.5cm tall, and can hold up to 400ml of water.
BENROSS - Benross are the leading manufacturers of electrical goods, heating & cooling appliances, and inflatable furniture. View the whole range on the Benross Amazon page today.
description: Product Description Benross Water Mist Spray Fan Simple Portable, Effective Cooling Keep cool and refreshed in the heat with this Water Mist Spray Fan! Its compact, portable design makes it the perfect summer companion. Choose from two colours - blue or pink. The fan is battery operated and can provide a calming breeze whenever you need it simply by turning it on. Cool yourself even further by using the water mist spray feature. To use the spray feature, simply fill the 400ml capacity tank with cold water - or even put some small ice cubes in for when it's really hot. Then, while the fan is operating, pull the trigger beneath the fan to spray a light covering of soothing, cool mist. KEY FEATURES Portable Lightweight 400ml Capacity Battery Operated Fill with Water or Ice EASY OPERATION The spray fan is battery operated and easy to use. Simply power it with 2x AA batteries (not included), turn it on via the button located on top, and pull the trigger underneath the fan whenever you want to feel a cool mist. 400ML CAPACITY The spray fan's tank stores up to 400ml of water or ice. This provides plenty of cool spray to last you a full day outdoors. PORTABLE & EFFECTIVE Take this spray fan with you wherever you go thanks to its portable size. It's ideal for summer holidays, picnics, sports events, beach trips, and more.
